dashboard.name: Executive Revenue Dashboard with Customer Satisfaction Metrics [MCP Custom]

variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == "RetailCorp" | fields json.companyName | dedup json.companyName

fetch bizevents 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName
| fields json.journeyType | dedup json.journeyType
fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter json.companyName == "RetailCorp" | fields json.stepName | dedup json.stepName

fetch bizevents
| fields json.serviceName, json.companyName, json.journeyType
| summarize count(),by:{json.companyName, json.journeyType, json.serviceName}
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType)
| dedup json.serviceName
| fields json.serviceName = lower(json.serviceName)
| filter isNotNull(json.serviceName)

smartscapeNodes PROCESS
| lookup [smartscapeNodes SERVICE | fields id, name], sourceField:name, lookupField:name, prefix:"svc."
| lookup [timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage), by:{dt.smartscape.process}], sourceField:id, lookupField:dt.smartscape.process, fields:{cpu}
| filter isNotNull(cpu)
| fieldsAdd LowerService = lower(name)
| filter in(LowerService, $Service)
| fields id
| dedup id

0.content:
# Executive Revenue Dashboard with Customer Satisfaction Metrics
## RetailCorp | Purchase Journey | Retail
**Data Signals:** 📊 Revenue | 📊 Loyalty
---

3.title: Customer Satisfaction
3.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.satisfactionRating)

4.title: Average Order Value
4.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.orderTotal)

5.title: Loyalty Points Earned
5.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = sum(additionalfields.loyaltyPoints)

7.title: Device Type Distribution
7.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.deviceType) | summarize count = count(), by: {additionalfields.deviceType} | sort count desc | limit 10

8.title: Revenue by Region
8.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.region) | summarize count = count(), by: {additionalfields.region} | sort count desc | limit 10

9.title: Processing Time Average
9.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.processingTime)

10.title: Customer Satisfaction by Channel
10.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.channel) | summarize count = count(), by: {additionalfields.channel} | sort count desc | limit 10

11.title: Order Total by Payment Method
11.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.paymentMethod) | summarize count = count(), by: {additionalfields.paymentMethod} | sort count desc | limit 10

13.title: Journey Steps
13.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Events = count(), Errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true), "Avg Processing (ms)" = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), by: {json.stepName} | sort Events desc

14.content:
---
🤖 *Dashboard generated by Bespoke AI (9 Ollama tiles + 5 sections, Grail field data) | 2026-03-20 | 14 tiles*
